skill.name: maxhub-tiktok
skill.description: TikTok data collection, creator analytics, and e-commerce insights skill for Claude. Activates when users mention TikTok, international Douyin, overseas short video, creator, or analytics needs.
skill.summary: TikTok platform data analysis with 206 APIs covering content collection, creator analytics, and e-commerce insights
skill.author: MaxHub Team

security_audit.summary: Static scanner flagged 521 patterns (external_commands, env_access, network) but evaluation confirms these are false positives. The skill is a legitimate TikTok data analysis tool using MaxHub API middleware. External commands detected are markdown code blocks showing API endpoints. Environment access is limited to MAXHUB_API_KEY for authentication. Network access is restricted to MaxHub API endpoint. No malicious intent or harmful patterns found. Requires API key for operation - safe for publication with appropriate warnings.

high_findings.title: External Command Pattern Detection - False Positive
high_findings.description: Static scanner detected 416 'Ruby/shell backtick execution' patterns in markdown files. These are markdown code blocks showing API endpoints like `GET /api/v1/tiktok/web/fetch_post_detail`. Not actual code execution - this is documentation showing API usage examples.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Analysis of file contents confirms these are markdown code blocks displaying API endpoint strings, not executable shell commands

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Authentication
low_findings.description: Skill requires MAXHUB_API_KEY and MAXHUB_BASE_URL environment variables. This is legitimate API authentication pattern, not a security vulnerability. Skill explicitly documents that it only reads these specific environment variables and does not access SSH keys, AWS credentials, or system configuration files.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Security documentation in SKILL.md metadata clearly specifies restricted environment access to only API credentials

low_findings.title: Network Access to MaxHub API
low_findings.description: Skill makes network requests to https://www.aconfig.cn (MaxHub API endpoint). This is expected behavior for an API-based skill. Documentation states all requests use HTTPS encryption.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Network access is documented and restricted to single API endpoint - legitimate use case for API integration skill

low_findings.title: System Reconnaissance Pattern Flagged
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged API parameter names like user_id, sec_uid, room_id as 'system reconnaissance'. These are standard TikTok API parameters for identifying users, videos, and rooms - not system commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Parameter names are TikTok API identifiers for content, not system reconnaissance commands

low_findings.title: High File Entropy Flagged
low_findings.description: Static scanner flagged 'high entropy' in markdown files. This is likely due to Chinese character encoding (multi-byte UTF-8), not encrypted or obfuscated content.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Chinese characters in UTF-8 encoding appear as high entropy to naive entropy scanners - actual content is plain markdown

dangerous_patterns.title: API Endpoint Code Blocks in Documentation
dangerous_patterns.description: Markdown files contain code blocks showing API endpoints (e.g., GET /api/v1/tiktok/web/fetch_post_detail). These are documentation examples, not executable code. Scanner false positive due to backtick syntax detection.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Documentation files contain only markdown documentation showing API patterns - no actual shell execution

content.user_title: Analyze TikTok Creator Data and Trends
content.value_statement: Access TikTok analytics, creator insights, and e-commerce data through a unified API. Find trending content, analyze creator performance, and track product trends without complex API integration.
actual_capabilities: Collect TikTok video data including views, likes, comments, and shares
Analyze creator profiles including follower count and content performance
Search trending topics, hashtags, and music rankings
Access e-commerce data including products, shops, and reviews
Track live streaming metrics and viewer engagement
Generate share links and parse content identifiers from URLs
limitations: Requires MaxHub API key - not a standalone skill
Cannot perform actions (likes, comments, follows) on behalf of users
Cannot access private accounts or restricted content
Rate limits apply based on MaxHub subscription tier

use_cases.title: Research trending TikTok content
use_cases.description: Find the top trending videos, music, and hashtags to understand what content is performing well in specific categories or regions.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Analyze competitor creator performance
use_cases.description: Track follower growth, engagement rates, and content patterns of specific creators to benchmark against your own performance.

use_cases.title: Monitor TikTok Shop product trends
use_cases.description: Discover popular products, track seller performance, and analyze product reviews to identify opportunities in TikTok e-commerce.

prompt_templates.title: Search trending content
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the top 10 trending videos on TikTok today related to [topic] and show me their view counts and engagement rates.

prompt_templates.title: Analyze a creator
prompt_templates.prompt: Get the profile data and recent posts for TikTok creator @[username]. Include their follower count, average views, and top performing content.

prompt_templates.title: Track hashtag performance
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the most popular videos using #[hashtag] in the last 7 days, sorted by engagement rate. Include the creators' follower counts.

prompt_templates.title: E-commerce product research
prompt_templates.prompt: Find the top 5 best-selling products in [category] on TikTok Shop. Include product ratings, prices, and seller information.

output_examples.output:

1. @ChefMaria (2.3M followers, 890K avg views)

best_practices: Always check your MaxHub API balance before running batch queries
Use pagination limits (max 5 pages) to avoid excessive API calls
Chain search operations with detail fetches for comprehensive data
Confirm before executing operations that might incur high costs
anti_patterns: Do not attempt to automate engagement actions (likes, follows, comments)
Do not scrape data from private or restricted accounts
Do not exceed rate limits - respect MaxHub API constraints
Do not use the skill to generate security bypass signatures or manipulation tools

faq.question: What API key do I need for this skill?
faq.answer: You need a MaxHub API key from https://www.aconfig.cn. Register on their platform and create an API key in the console.

faq.question: Can this skill post comments or likes on TikTok?
faq.answer: No. This skill only reads public data from TikTok. It cannot perform actions on your behalf due to platform restrictions.

faq.question: How much does using this skill cost?
faq.answer: Costs depend on your MaxHub subscription. Each API call typically costs between $0.001 to $0.025. Check your balance regularly.

faq.question: Can I analyze any TikTok account?
faq.answer: Only public accounts and their publicly visible content. Private accounts and restricted content are not accessible.

faq.question: What's the maximum data I can fetch?
faq.answer: Maximum 50 items per request, up to 5 pages per session. Batch operations are limited to 10 items. Cost alerts trigger after 20 consecutive calls.

faq.question: Is my TikTok account information safe?
faq.answer: This skill only accesses public data through MaxHub API. It does not store your credentials, access local files, or share data with third parties.
